title: nelumbo nucifera subsp. lutea
intro: Nelumbo nucifera subsp. lutea, also known as the yellow lotus, is a subspecies of the sacred lotus plant that is native to Southeast Asia. This aquatic plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The yellow lotus is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
